meaning: n.沙沙声,飒飒声vi.发出沙沙声,奋力工作,急速移动vt.使沙沙响
examples: You can see what was making the rustle in the undergrowth.
I heard a faint rustle in the bushes.
I'm sure I can rustle you up a sandwich.
The redwoods rustle overhead, the Big Sur River gurgles behind, and hiking trails beckon.
Even if the authorities rustle up the money, they can ill afford to dawdle.
